caption: In a large, well-lit hall with recessed ceiling lights and a blue carpeted floor, several people perform synchronized movements, possibly a martial arts demonstration. One man in a bright blue traditional outfit stands centrally, while others wear white, red, or black uniforms. In the initial moments, the individuals are spaced apart, with the man in blue facing away from the camera. As the sequence progresses, they execute a series of coordinated strikes and kicks. The man in blue raises his arm high and shifts his weight, while the person in black performs a high kick. The performers in white and red also shift their positions and move their arms in rhythmic patterns. In the background, an audience sits at tables, watching the performance. There is no visible on-screen text or logos throughout the sequence.
